skills.name: arbitrage_pipeline
skills.description: Master daily orchestrator — runs the full TikTok-to-Amazon arbitrage research cycle: discovery, sourcing, validation, and digest delivery.

skills.name: tiktok_discovery
skills.description: Scans US TikTok Shop bestsellers and viral product videos across beauty, gadgets, and home categories to surface qualifying trending products.

skills.name: supplier_sourcing
skills.description: Searches AliExpress, Alibaba, and 1688 for matching suppliers and ranks the top 3 per product by total landed cost.

skills.name: amazon_checker
skills.description: Verifies whether a product category is gated on Amazon, checks competition levels, and pulls FBA fee estimates for profit calculation.

skills.name: profit_calculator
skills.description: Calculates full landed cost, Amazon FBA fees, and net margin — and applies the 30% go/no-go gate before surfacing a product for recommendation.

skills.name: report_builder
skills.description: Writes the daily opportunity digest to Google Sheets and sends the morning email summary to the operator with the top 5 product opportunities.
